title: Shootin' Irons
writer: Richard Allen Gates, Sam Mintz, J. Walter Ruben
actors: Jack Luden, Sally Blane, Fred Kohler
plot: Pan Smith, a young Montana rancher, rescues Jim Blake and his daughter Lucy from a stampede of wild horses and invites the squatters to be his guests. Pan falls in love with Lucy, but rivalry develops soon between him and Dick Har...
